user.title: Authenticated
user.description:
Track the latest successful Home Assistant authentication.

Geo-IP lookup is optional. Choose `No Geo-IP lookup` to avoid sending login IP addresses to an external lookup service. `api.iplocation.net` only returns country-level location data.

Leave the ignore fields blank to track all successful logins. Ignored login IPs or networks skips matching IP addresses or CIDR ranges, such as `192.168.1.50` or `10.0.0.0/8`. Ignored auth client IDs skips specific Home Assistant auth clients/apps and is intended for advanced filtering.
